count of covered days (ACUTE_COV_DAYS and OIP_COV_DAYS) and payments (ACUTE_MDCR_PMT and 
OIP_MDCR_PMT), the algorithms include only claims that ended during the calendar year, and where 
the payment amount was >= $0. 

Acute inpatient hospital claims are a subset of the claims in the IP data file consisting of data from both
